details.name: Bio-Laden Grüne Wiese
details.extra_info: Nur Bio-Produkte. Kein Parkplatz. Kinderecke vorhanden.

images.prompt: Cartoon-style German supermarket advertisement poster: Title 'REWE - Wochenangebot' in large bold text. Shows: Hauptstraße 12, Mo-Sa 7-21 Uhr, apples 1.29€, milk 0.89€, bread 1.99€, parking available, delivery from 30€. Fuxie cartoon style, clean layout, warm bright colors, legible sans-serif font.
